items.title: Caitlin Clark postgame to @kelsie_kasperTV: "True resiliency, but we've got another one tomorrow. So this one is great, but let's move on."
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Caitlin Clark postgame to @kelsie_kasperTV: "True resiliency, but we've got another one tomorrow. So this one is great, but let's move on."

On defense: "It was kind of an embarrassing performance on the defensive end, I'll be honest. We really got to find a way to be better."

items.title: Fever come back and hang on to escape with a 110-107 win over the Storm.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever come back and hang on to escape with a 110-107 win over the Storm.

Caitlin Clark finishes with a career-high: 45pts, 11/18 FGs, 6/10 3FGs, 17/19 FTs, and 10asts. Kelsey Mitchell scored 30.

Next: Sat. v NY

items.title: What do you even say? Caitlin Clark with 45 points and 10 assists. An unbelievable performance. She guides the Fever comeback as they beat the Storm 110-107 and improve to 15-10.

items.title: Random POTD Anthony Randolph. LSU F was drafted 14th in 08 by GS. Peaked at 11 ppg 6 rpg in 09-10 but struggled to stick because he a tweener & had maturity issues. Out of NBA by 2014 but developed in Europe and had a great career abroad before retiring in 2024.

items.body_excerpt: Random POTD Anthony Randolph. LSU F was drafted 14th in 08 by GS. Peaked at 11 ppg 6 rpg in 09-10 but struggled to stick because he a tweener & had maturity issues. Out of NBA by 2014 but developed in Europe and had a great career abroad before retiring in 2024.

items.body_excerpt:
Get to know Celtics' rookie Dillon Mitchell.

From what he learned about himself along his basketball voyage to what he might be doing if he wasn't in the NBA, favorite memories under Rick Pitino, & something he can't wait to do when he gets to Boston.

Mitchell also has a message for Celtics fans:

items.title: Halftime: Sky 49, Sparks 36. It has been a slog offensively for Los Angeles, and the turnovers (12) have been problematic. Chicago made as many second-quarter shots (14) as the Sparks did in the entire first half. Nneka Ogwumike has 12 points, 7 rebounds.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Halftime: Sky 49, Sparks 36. It has been a slog offensively for Los Angeles, and the turnovers (12) have been problematic. Chicago made as many second-quarter shots (14) as the Sparks did in the entire first half. Nneka Ogwumike has 12 points, 7 rebounds.
